creator: vedge@hypertriton.com
text:
Created attachment 207488
Patch for emulators/beebem

BeebEm for UNIX is a BBC Micro and Master 128 emulator.  BeebEm supports the
BBC model B, B+, Integra Board and Master 128.  It also emulates Acorn 65C02,
Acorn Z80, Torch Z80 and Acorn 80186 second processors.  It provides 8271 and
1770 floppy disc support, tape emulation, sound, Econet support and SASI/SCSI
hard drive emulation.

WWW: http://beebem-unix.bbcmicro.com/
